Off Calendar Oct-17-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:

Charles O. Geerhart, for Plaintiff and moving party Yvette Pannell
Alison Yew, for Defendant and opposing party California Pizza Kitchen

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Yvette Pannell's motion to enforce prior order and for discovery sanctions is denied. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN

Off Calendar Aug-25-2006 Off Calendar

TDN SWEEP
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Set For Trial On Dec-04-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Production Of Documents
Off Calendar Jun-29-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Yvette Pannell's Motion to Compel Production of Documents granted in part, denied in part.
Defendant shall produce documents as identified and agreed to be produced in response to requests for production Nos. 11 and 12. If it has not done so by the date of this Order, defendant shall produce, without redaction, documents identified and agreed to be produced in response to request for production Nos. 16 and 19. Production of documents to be effected within 10 days of the date of this Order.

Motion denied as to request for production No. 15, without prejudice to plaintiff serving a supplementary request for production seeking an updated response.

Plaintiff's motion is denied with respect to any remaining request for production.

Request for sanctions denied. Commissioner: PAUL SLAVIT
